text: Webhook retries increased after deployment. Trace id trc-1001 shows queue publish latency and downstream timeout. No tokens or raw payloads are included.
Static proof page build passed but manifest check warned about missing evidence link for customer-safe screenshots.
Reviewer asked for source boundary notes before sharing generated evidence logs with external editors.
Agent summarized public OID references and excluded credentials, cookies, OTPs, payment data, and private account exports.
Optimized evidence pipeline should cache normalized tokens and reuse query plans across repeated review questions.
